response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the song 'Hana ni Bourei' by Yorushika from the Japanese text in the top-left corner of the video. 2. Identified the performers as Akai Haato and a guest (Lalien). 3. Conducted a web search for '"花に亡霊" Yorushika Japanese and English lyrics'. 4. Verified the lyrics and structured them into the required JSON format. The song performance lasts until 01:56.000, followed by a chatting segment.
response.global_summary: A performance of the song "Hana ni Bourei" by Yorushika, performed by two virtual YouTubers (Akai Haato and a guest, Lalien), followed by an interval of casual conversation.

scenes.description: Akai Haato and Lalien sing the song "Hana ni Bourei" in a virtual setting featuring a cherry blossom tree. The song title is displayed in the upper-left corner.
scenes.song_title: Hana ni Bourei (Ghosts in the Flower)

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
I wonder if I've already forgotten
Sitting in the shade of a summer day
Throwing an ice cream cone into my mouth
Waiting for the wind to blow

I want you to teach me more
I want you to teach me how to say goodbye, too
It's not just things that resonate in my heart
So tell me more words

I'm still seeing it
The ghost in the flower that blooms in summer
It's not about words, but time
It's not about time, but the heart
I take a shallow breath, wiping off the sweat, it feels like summer

I wonder if I've already forgotten
Sitting in the shade of a summer day
Throwing an ice cream cone into my mouth
Waiting for the wind to blow

I don't want to forget, I don't want it to fade
Because it's not everything that resonates in my heart
So tell me more words, teach me how to say goodbye
I'm still looking at it, the ghost in the flower that blooms in summer

Not with words, but with time
Not with time, but with the heart
Taking a shallow breath, wiping away the sweat, it feels like summer

I wonder if I've already forgotten
Sitting in the shade of a summer day
Throwing an ice cream cone into my mouth
Waiting for the wind to blow

I wonder if I've already forgotten
Sitting in the shade of a summer day
Throwing an ice cream cone into my mouth

scenes.description: The two performers finish the song and engage in a casual conversation/chatting segment to celebrate Akai Haato's birthday festival.
